title: Malty Velvety British Korean Pear Wrap
description: A low-calorie friendly dish featuring malty and velvety textures, with Korean pear as the main ingredient, wrapped in a British style ssam wrap, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a small bowl, mix together the malted milk powder, velvety cheese spread, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture evenly onto each tortilla, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Arrange 2-3 slices of Korean pear onto the center of each tortilla.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the pear slices.
Fold the bottom edge of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Cook the wraps for 2-3 minutes on each side, until the tortilla is lightly browned and the filling is heated through.
Serve the wraps warm and enjoy.
